title: phlegmariurus oceanianus
intro: Phlegmariurus oceanianus, also known as the New Zealand forked polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus oceanianus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Phlegmariurus oceanianus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
